name: website-agent-studio
description: Portable website workflow plugin with phase skills, state templates, and release scaffolds for building industrial-grade sites.

interface.shortDescription: Build and run website projects as a multi-phase agent workflow
interface.longDescription: Website Agent Studio packages reusable website delivery skills, state templates, queue templates, and orchestration guidance so an agent can run strategy, IA, design, engineering, QA, and continuity work in a controlled sequence.
defaultPrompt: Set up a website project workflow from brief to release
Audit this website project and tell me the active phase
Create the next queue item and state update for this web project
